overall.description: Gameplay footage from Warhammer 40,000: Space Marine 2 showing a Space Marine in power armor looting supplies in a dark industrial underground facility before engaging in combat with Tyranid alien creatures in a large energy-lit arena.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial supply corridor with ammunition storage

events.description: character opens ammo cache and collects las fusil energy rifle
character picks up medicae stimm health pack from the ground
character finishes looting and begins walking forward down the corridor

agents.ego_description: looting ammunition cache and medical supplies before proceeding down the industrial corridor

notable_agents.action: ally Space Marine appears and begins moving forward alongside the player

entered.detail: open military crate containing ammunition with glowing UI marker
weapon container holding the las fusil energy rifle
small medical supply box for health restoration
heavy industrial cables running along the wall and floor
large metal storage crate blocking part of the corridor

segments.scene_description: In a narrow industrial corridor, the Space Marine character interacts with an ammo cache and weapon crate to collect supplies. The environment features thick cable bundles and metal containers. An ally Space Marine appears on the left as the character finishes looting and begins to move forward at the end of the segment.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial transit corridor approaching combat arena

events.description: moving from enclosed supply room into wider industrial transit corridor
blue energy glow becomes visible in the distance ahead, illuminating the path

agents.ego_description: advancing steadily through the industrial facility toward the blue energy source

notable_agents.action: ally Space Marine walking ahead and slightly to the left of the player

entered.detail: large glowing blue energy source visible at the end of the corridor
massive industrial support column holding up the ceiling
metal grating walkway with railings on the sides
wide opening leading into a large circular chamber

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a semi-covered industrial corridor with metal walkways and structural pillars. The looted supplies are left behind as the character approaches a large opening revealing a blue energy conduit glowing in the distance. The ally maintains position to the left as they advance toward the combat arena entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: large circular combat arena with energy barriers

events.description: entering the large open combat arena from the narrow corridor
opening fire on approaching Tyranid enemies with the las fusil energy rifle
energy weapon fire causes a Tyranid enemy to explode in a shower of gore and blue particles

agents.ego_description: engaging hostile alien creatures with ranged energy weapon fire while maneuvering around the arena

notable_agents.action: Tyranid creatures charging aggressively toward the player character
ally Space Marine providing covering fire against the alien swarm

entered.detail: large circular stone-tiled floor covered in blood stains and debris
glowing blue energy pillars and barriers illuminating the combat space
damaged metal structures and broken machinery scattered around the arena edge
large industrial lighting array hanging from the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide combat arena with glowing blue energy barriers and industrial ruins. The Space Marine engages in intense combat with charging Tyranid creatures, firing the las fusil as enemies explode from energy impacts. Blood splatters across the stone floor while the ally provides support from the left flank, and overhead industrial lighting illuminates the chaotic battle.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cramped industrial corridor into a sprawling, energy-lit combat arena. It begins with a Space Marine looting ammo caches and weapon crates amidst thick cable bundles and metal containers, with an ally appearing on the left as they start to move forward. As the character advances, the environment shifts into a semi-covered walkway of structural pillars and metal grates, leading toward a distant, glowing blue energy conduit. The scene then opens wide into a massive arena of industrial ruins and blue energy barriers, where the focus shifts to intense combat against charging Tyranid creatures. The sequence concludes with the Space Marine firing a las fusil into the swarm, causing enemies to explode and blood to splatter across the stone floor under the glare of overhead industrial lighting.
